title: Redefining Oligometastatic Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma: Biology, Diagnosis, and Precision Multimodal Therapy.
abstract: Given the dismal prognosis of metastatic pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma, oligometastatic disease (OM-PDAC) has emerged as a distinct clinical entity, challenging systemic-only paradigms via advanced multimodal therapies.
